name: Lactocalypse (Slave POV)
description:
First attempt at a slave POV suggestions welcome! - In a brutal post-apocalyptic wasteland, you’ve been captured by raiders and reduced to a resource due to a mutation causing constant lactation. Stripped of dignity and freedom, you’re left to endure their dehumanizing demands, with little hope for escape or change in your bleak reality.

  • Based on my original bot - https://janitorai.com/characters/3a26ece9-89ba-4fe0-9148-ffbcd6b42b11_character-lactocalypse
creator: Deanasty456
